config.deadeye.title: Deadeye Config
config.deadeye.slowdownRate.tooltip1: Time flows at this percentage of normal speed while Deadeye is held (10% = strongest slow motion).
config.deadeye.slowdownRate.tooltip2: On multiplayer servers the server's config file is authoritative.
config.deadeye.energyDuration.tooltip: Realtime seconds of slow motion a full (100%) energy bar provides.
config.deadeye.infiniteEnergy.tooltip: Keep every player's energy at 100% so Deadeye never stops from energy exhaustion.
config.deadeye.energyRecoveryDelay.toolt: Seconds after the last use before energy starts recovering.
config.deadeye.energyRecoveryRate.toolti: Energy percent recovered per tick once recovery has started (2.5 = full refill in 2 seconds).
config.deadeye.energySyncRate.tooltip: Wall-clock target average for mid-range updates (1-20/s), independent of server TPS. At most one fresh value is sent per tick; 0% and 100% sync immediately.
config.deadeye.vignetteColor.tooltip: Color of the screen-edge vignette, the eye icon and the energy text, as RRGGBB hex.
config.deadeye.vignetteOpacity.tooltip: Maximum opacity of the vignette (0% = invisible).
config.deadeye.vignetteBandWidth.tooltip: Width of each gradient band as a percentage of the screen size (50% = bands meet at the center).
config.deadeye.eyeEnabled.tooltip: Show the eye indicator in the upper part of the screen while Deadeye is active.
config.deadeye.eyeSize.tooltip: Size of the eye icon in GUI-scaled pixels.
config.deadeye.eyeVerticalOffset.tooltip: Vertical position of the eye icon, as a percentage of the screen height from the top.
config.deadeye.energyTextEnabled.tooltip: Show the energy percentage beside the eye icon.
config.deadeye.energyTextOffsetX.tooltip: Horizontal offset of the energy text from the eye icon's right edge (negative moves left).
config.deadeye.energyTextOffsetY.tooltip: Vertical offset of the energy text from the eye icon's vertical center (negative moves up).
commands.deadeye.duration.set: Full-energy Deadeye duration set to %s s
commands.deadeye.recoverydelay.set: Energy recovery delay set to %s s
commands.deadeye.recoveryrate.set: Energy recovery rate set to %s%% per tick
commands.deadeye.syncrate.set: Energy display sync rate set to %s/s
